headline: Amazon's Global TV Chief Sets Stage for RTS London Summit
lede: Amazon Prime Video is set to dominate the Royal Television Society's London convention, with international head Kelly Day taking a pivotal leadership role in the 2026 gathering.
body:
## Amazon Takes Center Stage at RTS London

Amazon is poised to make a significant splash at the upcoming Royal Television Society convention, positioning its international leadership front and center. Prime Video and Amazon MGM Studios will serve as principal sponsors for the first time, signaling the streaming giant's escalating influence in the global entertainment landscape.

### Strategic Leadership Positioning

Kelly Day, Amazon's international chief, will headline the event, providing critical insights into the company's expansive global content strategy. Her keynote is expected to outline how Amazon continues to push boundaries in international original programming and streaming technology.

The convention marks a strategic moment for Amazon, which has been aggressively expanding its global content footprint. By chairing the prestigious RTS London event, the company demonstrates its commitment to international television production and distribution.

### Industry Implications

Tara Erer, Head of Northern European Originals, will also play a critical role in chairing the convention. Her involvement underscores Amazon's deep investment in regional content development and cross-border storytelling strategies.

The RTS London convention represents a crucial platform for industry leaders to discuss emerging trends, technological innovations, and content creation challenges in the rapidly evolving streaming ecosystem.
key_facts: Amazon Prime Video first-time principal RTS London sponsor
Kelly Day to deliver keynote address
Signals Amazon's expanding global content strategy
